dmirror_instruction: • Akisi matriki kupitia mstari wa pembe
cmirror_instruction: • Akisi matriki kupitia mstari wa pembe kinyume
zero_divisible_instruction: • Weka vipengele vyote vinavyogawanyika na {k} kuwa sifuri
crop_instruction: • Kata matriki hadi safu {row_start}-{row_end} na safu wima {col_start}-{col_end} (kuanzia 1)
